description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU Release Build that triggers on push to main, pull requests to main, and manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on a linux.12xlarge host, sets up Miniconda, and builds FBGEMM_GPU for Python 3.8, 3.9, 3.10 with CUDA 11.7.1. The test_and_publish_artifact job runs on a linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu host, downloads the built artifact, tests FBGEMM_GPU with PyTest, and pushes the package to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push.
